title: AI Workflow Audit Checklist
summary: A step-by-step checklist for SMBs to map their workflows, find high-ROI AI opportunities, and build a realistic implementation roadmap before spending a dollar on tooling.

title: SMB AI Readiness Checklist
summary: A practical checklist to gauge whether your team, data, tools, and processes are ready for AI, and what to fix first.

title: AI Governance Policy Template
summary: A starting-point AI use policy small and mid-sized businesses can adapt: approved tools, acceptable use, data-handling rules, human review, and clear roles.

title: AI Automation Use Case Library
summary: A working catalog of SMB workflows where AI automation pays off fast, organized by business function, plus how to spot good candidates.

title: Private AI Knowledge Assistant Guide
summary: What it takes for an SMB to stand up an internal assistant that answers from approved company knowledge, with the retrieval, guardrails, access controls, and maintenance that keep it trustworthy.

title: AI-Generated Code Security Checklist
summary: Review AI-written code for injection, auth gaps, hardcoded secrets, hallucinated dependencies, and unsafe defaults before you merge.

title: LLM Application Security Checklist
summary: Secure apps that call LLMs: trust boundaries, output validation, data exposure to providers, access control, and cost abuse.

title: Prompt Injection Review Checklist
summary: Defend against direct and indirect prompt injection: prompt construction, untrusted content, output handling, and action gating.
key_points: Indirect injection from tools, RAG, and the web

title: RAG Security Checklist
summary: Secure retrieval-augmented generation: ingestion trust, tenant isolation, vector database exposure, and retrieval-time access control.

title: AI Agent Security Checklist
summary: Constrain tool-using agents: least-privilege tools, sandboxed filesystem and shell, human approval gates, loop limits, and audit logs.

title: MCP Security Checklist
summary: Harden Model Context Protocol servers and tools: blast-radius review, authorization, allowlists, mutation gates, and audit logging.
